title: Module A — What The Gradient Is
quote: Artificial intelligence is understood as one instrument among many. It is neither oracle nor authority.
interpretation: Interpretation: The Gradient uses tools to increase legibility, but responsibility for judgment remains human and explicit.
readerInstruction: Reader instruction: Hold the institution as a constitutional ecology first. Do not mistake the interface for the institution.

modal.sub: Establish The Gradient as constitutional knowledge ecology (not product/platform).
modal.purpose: Establish The Gradient as a constitutional knowledge ecology, not a product or platform.
modal.why: This gives newcomers the basic frame before they encounter the architecture.
modal.readNext: Read next: Founding White Paper v0.1 → then IDR-003.

title: Module B — Institutional Anatomy
quote: The Archive of Becoming — preserves institutional memory. Nothing is erased. Understanding matures through reclassification.
interpretation: Interpretation: The organs exist so memory, governance, and teaching don't fight for the same surface.
readerInstruction: Reader instruction: When something feels confusing, ask which organ it belongs to before you decide what it is.

modal.sub: Explain organs preserving memory, governance, inheritance, continuity.
modal.purpose: Explain the organs that preserve memory, governance, inheritance, and continuity.
modal.why: The Gradient separates functions so memory, governance, and practice do not collapse into one overloaded system.
modal.readNext: Read next: Constitution v0.1 Ecology of Memory section → then Charter locked decisions.

title: Module C — Knowledge Architecture
quote: Relationships should behave as verbs: supports, contradicts, expands, revises, sources, operationalizes, challenges, returns to.
interpretation: Interpretation: This preserves plural belonging and prevents one-folder distortions.
readerInstruction: Reader instruction: When you add knowledge, name the relationship first. Classification comes later.

modal.why: The system preserves context by asking how things relate, not just where they are stored.
modal.readNext: Read next: IDR-002 → then Constitution Card layers + Knowledge Architecture.

title: Module D — Operating Loop
quote: Admission precedes metabolization. Provenance precedes authority. Relationship precedes classification. Revision remains permanent. Nothing simply disappears.
interpretation: Interpretation: The loop protects continuity by forcing traceability before authority.
readerInstruction: Reader instruction: Trust the loop over the interface. If the loop is broken, the institution is broken.

modal.purpose: Show how knowledge moves through admission, review, metabolization, practice, and memory.
modal.why: The Gradient proves itself through one complete loop, not through a feature list.
modal.readNext: Read next: Founding White Paper First proof loop → then IDR-003.

title: Module E — Engines and Practice Frameworks
quote: A repeatable method for transforming one form of understanding into another… Engines organize interpretation. They never replace judgment.
interpretation: Interpretation: Engines must disclose evidence, blind spots, and failure modes so they don't become hidden governors.
readerInstruction: Reader instruction: Treat engines as methods with declared limits, not as authority-generators.

modal.sub: Repeatable methods that transform understanding without replacing judgment.
modal.purpose: Explain engines as repeatable methods that transform understanding without replacing judgment.
modal.why: This prevents methods, tools, or AI systems from becoming hidden authorities.
modal.readNext: Read next: Constitution How The Gradient Knows → then Engine Registry.

title: Module F — Implementation as Servant Layer
interpretation: Interpretation: Software may assist work, but cannot ratify truth or redefine the institution.
readerInstruction: Reader instruction: When a tool feels powerful, ask what constitutional commitment constrains it.

modal.sub: Why software, dashboards, and agents remain downstream.
modal.purpose: Explain why software, dashboards, agents, and databases remain downstream of institutional design.
modal.why: This protects The Gradient from becoming just another app.
modal.readNext: Read next: IDR-003 → then Constitution preamble lines on AI as instrument.
